findings.description: confidence added as required field on TaxonomyTag but existing consumers (tag-confirmation.test.tsx, review-form.test.tsx) construct TaxonomyTag fixtures without it — TypeScript compilation will fail. Fix: make confidence optional (confidence?: number) and update AttributeChips sort to use nullish coalescing.

_extract_taxonomy_tags now has confidence threshold filtering and confidence passthrough logic with no test coverage. Per CLAUDE.md, API route handlers are critical paths requiring 80%+ coverage. Add a unit test covering: (1) tags below threshold are filtered, (2) confidence is included in output, (3) None confidence is handled.
